title: roldana metepecus
intro: Roldana metepecus, also known as tree daisy or mountain marigold, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family, native to Mexico and parts of Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Roldana metepecus include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throat, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Roldana metepecus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
